emails.subject: November 30 Officialized Post ID's
emails.body: November 30 Officialized Post ID's Here is the Post ID's that we officialized on November 30th. Call me if you have any questions. AL x6767

emails.subject: RE: November 30 Officialized Post ID's
emails.body: RE: November 30 Officialized Post ID's Albert, I spot checked a few of these and they are not all official. Can you please list only the Nov 30th official post-id's? I can't tell from your post-id sheets if I'm picking the correct ones. Thanks To: Keiser, Kam

emails.subject: RE: November 30 Officialized Post ID's
emails.body: Here are all the post ID's that were officialized on the 30th. AL To: Luc, Albert
